xpath.attribute: { 'partner_id': partner_id, 'move_type': parent.move_type, 'search_default_type_asset_fixed': 'in_' in parent.move_type, 'search_default_type_expense': 'in_' in parent.move_type, 'search_default_account_type': 'income', 'preferred_account_type': 'out_' in parent.move_type and 'income' or 'in_' in parent.move_type and 'expense', }
